results.description: Node Express receives request, forwards to Python Flask via HTTP, Python query concatenates user input into SQL.

Node Express publishes to Kafka topic; Python consumer feeds the message body into os.system. The queue producer/consumer pair IS detected (see cross-language chain at worker.py); the Python os.system sink is a Phase-2 detector gap so the command-injection finding at worker.py:12 is currently an FN.

Write user-controlled HTML to the User.bio column via Mongoose; later read it back into res.send → second-order XSS. The mass-assignment + data-exposure findings on the writer side are also expected. (XSS through the DB-read path is a Phase-2 detector gap; left as FN.)
Node → Node via OpenAPI; SQL injection sink at the second-hop Node service. Tests the cross-language OpenAPI bridge with both sides covered by today's Node SAST.
